title: Settlers of Mars & D&D Role Player Adventure: The Gateway to Space Science Mastery
description:
An open educational game that blends the resource-management mechanics of Settlers of Catan with Dungeons & Dragons role-play and a browser colony sim, to teach space biology, biotechnology, and aerospace engineering. Includes 3D-printable board pieces (STL), AI "Space Wizard" Dungeon-Master prompt templates, example board layouts, and a companion browser game (Lunar & Martian Frontier).

Playable and documented at https://dr-richard-barker.github.io/Settlers_of_Mars_3D_LLM/
notes: An independent educational project. Not affiliated with or endorsed by NASA, ESA, or the makers of Settlers of Catan or Dungeons & Dragons. TODO before minting: credit the original Insight Wisconsin inventors'-club students as creators (check consent for minors).
